reasoning_content:
We need to determine if 1511 is prime. Check divisibility: 
- Not even (ends with 1). 
- Sum of digits: 1+5+1+1=8, not divisible by 3. 
- Ends with 1, not 5, so not divisible by 5. 
- Check 7: 7*215=1505, remainder 6, so not divisible. 
- 11: 11*137=1507, remainder 4, so no. 
- 13: 13*116=1508, remainder 3; 13*117=1521 too big. 
- 17: 17*88=1496, remainder 15; 17*89=1513 too big. 
- 19: 19*79=1501, remainder 10; 19*80=1520. 
- 23: 23*65=1495, remainder 16; 23*66=1518. 
- 29: 29*52=1508, remainder 3; 29*53=1537. 
- 31: 31*48=1488, remainder 23; 31*49=1519. 
- 37: 37*40=1480, remainder 31; 37*41=1517, too big (1517 is 37*41? Actually 37*41=1517, yes, so 1511 is 6 less). 
- 41: 41*36=1476, remainder 35; 41*37=1517. 
- 43: 43*35=1505, remainder 6; 43*36=1548. 
- 47: 47*32=1504, remainder 7; 47*33=1551. 
- 53: 53*28=1484, remainder 27; 53*29=1537. 
- 59: 59*25=1475, remainder 36; 59*26=1534. 
- 61: 61*24=1464, remainder 47; 61*25=1525. 
- 67: 67*22=1474, remainder 37; 67*23=1541. 
- 71: 71*21=1491, remainder 20; 71*22=1562. 
- 73: 73*20=1460, remainder 51; 73*21=1533. 
- 79: 79*19=1501, remainder 10; 79*20=1580. 
- 83: 83*18=1494, remainder 17; 83*19=1577. 
- 89: 89*16=1424, remainder 87; 89*17=1513, too big. 
- 97: 97*15=1455, remainder 56; 97*16=1552. 
We only need to check up to sqrt(1511). sqrt(1511) is about 38.87 (since 39^2=1521). So check primes up to 37. We already checked up to 37. None divided exactly. So 1511 is prime. Answer yes.
